text: masa devar-yehva el-yiserael beyad maleakhi
ahaveti etekhem amar yehva vaamaretem bama ahavetanu halov-ach 'esav leya'aqov neum-yehva vaohav et-ya'aqov
veet-'esav saneti vaasim et-harayv shemama veet-nachalatov letanovt midebar
ki-tomar edovm rushashenu venashuv venivene choravovt ko amar yehva tsevaovt hema yivenu vaani eherovs veqareu lahem gevul rishe'a veha'am asher-za'am yehva 'ad-'ovlam
ve'eyneykhem tireeyna veatem tomeru yigedal yehva me'al ligevul yiserael
ben yekhabed av ve'eved adonayv veim-av ani aye khevovdi veim-adovnim ani aye movrai amar ׀ yehva tsevaovt lakhem hakohanim bovzey shemi vaamaretem bame vazinu et-shemekha
magishim 'al-mizebechi lechem megoal vaamaretem bame gealenukha beemarekhem shulechan yehva niveze hu
vekhi-tagishun 'iver lizebocha eyn ra' vekhi tagishu pisecha vechole eyn ra' haqerivehu na lefechatekha hayiretsekha ov hayisa faneykha amar yehva tsevaovt
ve'ata chalu-na feney-el vichanenu miyedekhem hayeta zot hayisa mikem panim amar yehva tsevaovt
mi gam-bakhem veyisegor delatayim velo-tairu mizebechi chinam eyn-li chefets bakhem amar yehva tsevaovt uminecha lo-eretse miyedekhem
ki mimizerach-shemesh ve'ad-mevovov gadovl shemi bagovyim uvekhal-maqovm muqetar mugash lishemi uminecha tehovra ki-gadovl shemi bagovyim amar yehva tsevaovt
veatem mechalelim ovtov beemarekhem shulechan adonay megoal hu venivov niveze akhelov
vaamaretem hine matelaa vehipachetem ovtov amar yehva tsevaovt vahavetem gazul veet-hapisecha veet-hachovle vahavetem et-haminecha haeretse ovtah miyedekhem amar yehva s
vearur novkhel veyesh be'ederov zakhar venoder vezovecha mashechat ladonay ki melekh gadovl ani amar yehva tsevaovt ushemi novra vagovyim
ve'ata aleykhem hamitseva hazot hakohanim
im-lo tisheme'u veim-lo tasimu 'al-lev latet kavovd lishemi amar yehva tsevaovt veshilacheti vakhem et-hameera vearovti et-birekhovteykhem vegam arovtiha ki eynekhem samim 'al-lev
hineni go'er lakhem et-hazera' vezeriti feresh 'al-peneykhem peresh chageykhem venasa etekhem elayv
vida'etem ki shilacheti aleykhem et hamitseva hazot liheyovt beriti et-levi amar yehva tsevaovt
beriti ׀ hayeta itov hachayim vehashalovm vaetenem-lov movra vayiraeni umipeney shemi nichat hu
tovrat emet hayeta befihu ve'avela lo-nimetsa visefatayv beshalovm uvemishovr halakh iti verabim heshiv me'aon
ki-sifetey khohen yishemeru-da'at vetovra yevaqeshu mipihu ki maleakh yehvah-tsevaovt hu
veatem saretem min-haderekh hikheshaletem rabim batovra shichatem berit halevi amar yehva tsevaovt
vegam-ani natati etekhem nivezim ushefalim lekhal-ha'am kefi asher eynekhem shomerim et-derakhay venoseim panim batovra f
halov av echad lekhulanu halov el echad beraanu madu'a nivegad ish beachiv lechalel berit avoteynu
bageda yehuda vetov'eva ne'eseta veyiserael uvirushalaim ki ׀ chilel yehuda qodesh yehva asher ahev uva'al bat-el nekhar
yakheret yehva laish asher ya'asena 'er ve'one meaholey ya'aqov umagish minecha layhva tsevaovt f
vezot shenit ta'asu kasovt dime'a et-mizebach yehva bekhi vaanaqa meeyn 'ovd penovt el-haminecha velaqachat ratsovn miyedekhem
vaamaretem 'al-ma 'al ki-yehva he'id beynekha uveyn ׀ eshet ne'ureykha asher ata bagadeta bah vehi chaveretekha veeshet beritekha
velo-echad 'asa ushear rucha lov uma haechad mevaqesh zera' elohim venishemaretem beruchakhem uveeshet ne'ureykha al-yivegod
ki-sane shalach amar yehva elohey yiserael vekhisa chamas 'al-levushov amar yehva tsevaovt venishemaretem beruchakhem velo tivegodu s
hovga'etem yehva bedivereykhem vaamaretem bama hovga'enu beemarekhem kal-'ose ra' tovv ׀ be'eyney yehva uvahem hu chafets ov aye elohey hamishepat
hineni sholecha maleakhi ufinah-derekh lefanay ufiteom yavov el-heykhalov haadovn ׀ asher-atem mevaqeshim umaleakh haberit asher-atem chafetsim hineh-va amar yehva tsevaovt
umi mekhalekel et-yovm bovov umi ha'omed beheraovtov ki-hu keesh metsaref ukhevorit mekhabesim
veyashav metsaref umetaher kesef vetihar et-beney-levi veziqaq otam kazahav vekhakasef vehayu layhva magishey minecha bitsedaqa
ve'areva layhva minechat yehuda virushalaim kimey 'ovlam ukheshanim qademoniyovt
veqaraveti aleykhem lamishepat vehayiti ׀ 'ed memaher bamekhashefim uvamenaafim uvanisheba'im lashaqer uve'osheqey sekharsa-khir alemana veyatovm umatey-ger velo yereuni amar yehva tsevaovt
ki ani yehva lo shaniti veatem beney-ya'aqov lo khelitem
lemimey avoteykhem saretem mechuqay velo shemaretem shuvu elay veashuva aleykhem amar yehva tsevaovt vaamaretem bame nashuv
hayiqeba' adam elohim ki atem qove'im oti vaamaretem bame qeva'anukha hama'aser vehateruma
bameera atem nearim veoti atem qove'im hagovy kulov
haviu et-kal-hama'aser el-beyt haovtsar vihi teref beveyti uvechanuni na bazot amar yehva tsevaovt im-lo efetach lakhem et arubovt hashamayim vahariqoti lakhem berakha 'ad-beli-day
vega'areti lakhem baokhel velo-yashechit lakhem et-peri haadama velo-teshakel lakhem hagefen basade amar yehva tsevaovt
veisheru etekhem kal-hagovyim ki-tiheyu atem erets chefets amar yehva tsevaovt s
chazequ 'alay divereykhem amar yehva vaamaretem mah-nidebarenu 'aleykha
amaretem shave 'avod elohim umah-betsa' ki shamarenu mishemaretov vekhi halakhenu qedoranit mipeney yehva tsevaovt
ve'ata anachenu measherim zedim gam-nivenu 'osey rishe'a gam bachanu elohim vayimaletu
az nideberu yireey yehva ish et-re'ehu vayaqeshev yehva vayishema' vayikatev sefer zikarovn lefanayv leyireey yehva ulechoshevey shemov
vehayu li amar yehva tsevaovt layovm asher ani 'ose segula vechamaleti 'aleyhem kaasher yachemol ish 'al-benov ha'oved otov
veshavetem ureitem beyn tsadiq lerasha' beyn 'oved elohim laasher lo 'avadov s
ki-hine hayovm ba bo'er katanur vehayu khal-zedim vekhal-'ose rishe'a qash velihat otam hayovm haba amar yehva tsevaovt asher lo-ya'azov lahem shoresh ve'anaf
vezarecha lakhem yireey shemi shemesh tsedaqa umarepe bikhenafeyha vitsatem ufishetem ke'egeley marebeq
ve'asovtem resha'im ki-yiheyu efer tachat kapovt rageleykhem bayovm asher ani 'ose amar yehva tsevaovt f
zikheru tovrat moshe 'avedi asher tsiviti ovtov vechorev 'al-kal-yiserael chuqim umishepatim
hine anokhi sholecha lakhem et eliya hanavi lifeney bov yovm yehva hagadovl vehanovra
veheshiv lev-avovt 'al-banim velev banim 'al-avovtam pen-avov vehikeyti et-haarets cherem
